stimulus: A film historian analyzed the availability of older black-and-white feature films on streaming platforms. The historian found that the highest percentage of still-available films were initially released in ______
stem: Which choice most effectively uses data from the table to complete the statement?
rationale:
Choice A is correct because 61% of films from 1950–1954 are still available, the highest percentage in the table.

Choice B is incorrect: 1940–1944 has 28% available, lower than 1950–1954. Choice C is incorrect: 1930–1934 has only 12% available. Choice D is incorrect: 1920–1924 has only 4% available, the lowest.
